item.title: How to effectively deal with crystal oscillator failure in TM4C129X MCU
item.author: Hedy
item.content:encoded: Here’s a proven playbook for handling a crystal (MOSC) failure on TI’s TM4C129x MCUs:1) Turn on the hardware monitor (and set it up correctly)Enable MOSC verification: set MOSCCTL.CVAL = 1.Pick the proper range: for 10–25 MHz crystals, set MOSCCTL.OSCRNG = 1 (High-frequency range).Tell the chip a crystal is actually connected: clear MOSCCTL.NOXTAL when you have a crystal or single-ended clock attached.Don’t power it down accidentally: clear MOSCCTL.PWRDN for crystal mode; and consider locking MOSC on across sleep/“accidental power-down” by setting DSCLKCFG.MOSCDPD = 1 if peripherals (e.g., Ethernet PHY) depend on MOSC. 2) Decide the failure action: reset+NMI or interruptThe monitor runs continuously; if the main oscillator goes out of bounds, hardware auto-switches the system clock to the 16 MHz PIOSC. Then one of two things happens, based on MOSCCTL.MOSCIM:MOSCIM = 0: internal reset occurs, RESC.MOSCFAIL is set, and execution is vectored to the NMI handler on reboot.MOSCIM = 1: a maskable interrupt is raised (RIS.MOFRIS / MISC.MOFMIS flow). Choose the path that best fits your product’s safety story (reset-for-safety vs. stay up and degrade service). Tip: On older silicon, the NMIC register may not reliably indicate the NMI source. Use RIS.MOFRIS to confirm a MOSC failure (errata SYSCTL#13). 3) What your handler should actually doWhether you land in NMI (after a reset) or a normal ISR:Read and then clear RESC.MOSCFAIL (write 0 to clear that sticky bit).If using interrupts, clear the MISC.MOFMIS bit by writing 1 to it. You’re already on PIOSC (hardware switched you), but explicitly ensure the system stays on a stable source (PIOSC or PLL sourced from PIOSC) until recovery. 3. Attempt recovery with a timeoutRe-enable MOSC (clear PWRDN, keep NOXTAL=0), wait for MOSC power-up (RIS.MOSCPUPRIS), then re-lock PLL (watch RIS.PLLLRIS). If any wait times out, abort and stay in “safe mode.” Only after MOSC and PLL are stable, switch system clock back to MOSC/PLL and resume services that require precise timing (Ethernet/USB/etc.). 4) Add a belt-and-suspenders watchdogRun Watchdog 1 from an alternate clock (PIOSC/LFIOSC via ALTCLK) so it still barks even if MOSC disappears. If your recovery logic stalls, the watchdog（What is a Watchdog?） guarantees a reset. 5) What MOSC failure can (and can’t) detectThe verification circuit does run at runtime (not just at start) and detects when MOSC frequency wanders outside a broad valid band. It’s not a precision drift detector (e.g., 25 MHz → 24 MHz may not trip it). If you need tighter assurance, implement a software cross-check that measures a MOSC-derived clock against PIOSC. 6) Common pitfalls & errata to mindEEPROM/flash operations: resets (including MOSC-failure resets) during EEPROM writes can corrupt data; avoid non-volatile writes in your failure path. Deep-sleep power: some revisions had higher deep-sleep current if MOSC wasn’t explicitly turned off; follow the recommended MOSC power sequencing (and use MOSCDPD when you must keep MOSC alive). ROM driver quirk: early ROM SysCtlClockFreqSet had MOSC issues; use the flash version from TivaWare if you’re on affected silicon. Minimal checklist (copy into your bring-up notes) Set MOSCCTL: CVAL=1, OSCRNG=1 (≥10 MHz), NOXTAL=0, PWRDN=0. Choose action: MOSCIM=0 (reset+NMI) or MOSCIM=1 (interrupt) and enable IMC.MOFIM. In handler: clear MISC.MOFMIS or RESC.MOSCFAIL, stay on PIOSC, try timed MOSC/PLL re-bring-up. Enable WDT1 on ALTCLK (PIOSC/LFIOSC) as a last resort. If Ethernet/PHY depends on MOSC, set DSCLKCFG.MOSCDPD=1 so MOSC can’t be auto-powered down.

item.title: Crystal Pro Switch 30000 Box of 5 Premium Disposable Vape
item.author: Wholesale Vapes
item.content:encoded: Crystal Pro Switch 30000 Box of 5 – High-Capacity Disposable VapeThe UK vaping market has rapidly evolved, offering users a variety of convenient, high-performance disposable vapes. Among the top choices for heavy users is the Crystal Pro Switch 30000 Box of 5, a device designed for long-lasting use, premium flavor quality, and maintenance-free convenience.This article explores the features, benefits, and reasons why the Crystal Pro Switch 30000 is highly popular for personal vaping and retail in the UK.Overview of Crystal Pro Switch 30000The Crystal Pro Switch 30000 is a high-capacity disposable vape that delivers up to 30,000 puffs per device. Packaged in a box of 5, it is ideal for users who want an extended vaping experience without the need for frequent replacements.Its sleek design, variety of flavors, and hassle-free operation make it suitable for both beginners and experienced vapers. The Crystal Pro Switch 30000 offers a reliable and consistent vaping experience from the first puff to the last.With up to 30,000 puffs per device, the Crystal Pro Switch 30000 is perfect for heavy vapers seeking a long-lasting disposable vape. This eliminates the need for multiple devices and provides exceptional value.The device is available in numerous flavors, including fruity, menthol, and dessert-inspired options. Each flavor is carefully formulated to provide smooth, consistent taste throughout the device’s lifespan.Sleek and Ergonomic DesignCrystal Pro Switch 30000 features a slim and lightweight design that fits comfortably in your hand or pocket. Its modern aesthetics and portability make it ideal for users on the go.Maintenance-Free OperationNo refills, charging, or coil replacements are required. Users simply enjoy the device until it is finished, then dispose of it responsibly, making it an ideal hassle-free vaping solution.Consistent Vapor ProductionEngineered for uniform vapor and flavor, the Crystal Pro Switch 30000 ensures every puff is smooth, satisfying, and flavorful, maintaining a premium vaping experience from start to finish.Benefits of Using Crystal Pro Switch 30000 ConvenienceThe Crystal Pro Switch 30000 is ready to use immediately, with no setup or maintenance required. Beginners and experienced vapers alike can enjoy a simple, hassle-free experience.Cost-Effective for Heavy VapersWith its extremely high puff count, this disposable vape reduces the need for frequent replacements, offering excellent value for money.Portable and Travel-FriendlyIts compact, lightweight design allows users to carry it easily for on-the-go vaping, ensuring convenience for commuting, travel, or daily use.The Crystal Pro Switch 30000 Box of 5 is a high-demand product for vape shops and wholesalers. Its premium quality and popularity among consumers ensure fast turnover and satisfied customers.Store Properly: Keep in a cool, dry place to maintain flavor and performance.Smooth Inhales: Take slow, steady draws to maximize flavor and vapor production.Dispose Responsibly: Follow local disposal guidelines to minimize environmental impact.Why Choose Crystal Pro Switch 30000?High Puff Capacity: Up to 30,000 puffs for long-lasting use.Premium Flavors: Smooth, consistent taste throughout the device.Maintenance-Free Design: No need to refill, charge, or replace coils.Stylish and Portable: Sleek, lightweight, and ergonomic design.Some popular flavors in the Crystal Pro Switch 30000 range include:Tropical Fruit Mix: Sweet and refreshing tropical blend.Cool Menthol: Crisp, cooling menthol for a refreshing vaping experience.Vanilla Custard: Smooth, creamy dessert-inspired flavor.Berry Blast: Rich and tangy berry combination.Classic Tobacco: Traditional tobacco flavor for a classic vaping experience.Each flavor delivers smooth draws, rich vapor, and a satisfying experience from the first puff to the last.Who Can Benefit from Crystal Pro Switch 30000?Heavy Vapers: Long-lasting device for extended use.Beginners: Ready-to-use, maintenance-free disposable vape.Travelers: Compact, portable, and convenient for on-the-go use.Retailers: High-demand product suitable for a wide customer base.The Crystal Pro Switch 30000 Puffs Box of 5 is a premium disposable vape that combines longevity, flavor, and convenience. Its extraordinary puff count, wide flavor range, and maintenance-free design make it ideal for both personal users and retailers.Whether you are a beginner or an experienced vaper, the Crystal Pro Switch 30000 provides a smooth, satisfying, and hassle-free experience. Its growing popularity in the UK positions it as a must-have disposable vape for anyone seeking reliability, flavor, and extended use.

item.title: Crystal Pro 10000 Box of 5 Long-Lasting Disposable Vape
item.author: Vape Zone Wholesale
item.content:encoded: Crystal Pro 10000 Box of 5 – High-Quality Disposable VapeThe UK vaping market has expanded significantly, providing users with convenient and reliable disposable vape options. Among these, the Crystal Pro 10000 Box of 5 stands out for its long-lasting performance, premium flavor selection, and hassle-free design.This article explores the key features, benefits, and reasons why the Crystal Pro 10000 is a popular choice for both personal use and retail.Overview of Crystal Pro 10000The Crystal Pro 10000 is a disposable vape designed to provide up to 10,000 puffs per device. Its high puff count ensures users enjoy an extended vaping experience without frequent replacements.Packaged in a box of 5, it is suitable for regular vapers or vape stores looking to stock a premium disposable vape. Its sleek design, flavor variety, and maintenance-free operation make it a versatile choice for all types of users.Each Crystal Pro 10000 device provides up to 10,000 puffs, making it ideal for daily vapers who want a reliable and long-lasting vaping solution.The device comes in a wide range of flavors, including fruity, menthol, and dessert-inspired options. Each flavor is designed to deliver smooth and consistent taste from the first puff to the last.Sleek and Ergonomic DesignCrystal Pro 10000 features a slim, lightweight, and ergonomic design. Its portable and stylish construction makes it comfortable to use and easy to carry in pockets or bags.No refills, coil replacements, or charging are needed. Users can enjoy the device until it is finished and then dispose of it responsibly, providing a simple and convenient experience.Consistent Vapor ProductionThe device is engineered to deliver consistent vapor and flavor throughout its lifespan, ensuring every puff is smooth, flavorful, and satisfying.Benefits of Using Crystal Pro 10000 ConvenienceThe Crystal Pro 10000 is ready to use straight from the box, eliminating the need for setup or maintenance. This makes it an excellent choice for beginners and anyone seeking a hassle-free vaping experience.With up to 10,000 puffs per device, it offers great value compared to lower-capacity disposable vapes. Its longevity reduces the need for frequent replacements.Compact and lightweight, the Crystal Pro 10000 is perfect for on-the-go vaping. Users can enjoy a portable and convenient experience anytime.For vape shops and wholesalers, the Crystal Pro 10000 Box of 5 is a high-demand product. Its premium quality and popularity among consumers ensure fast turnover and satisfied customers.Store Properly: Keep in a cool, dry place to maintain flavor and device performance.Smooth Inhales: Take slow, steady draws to maximize flavor and vapor production.Dispose Responsibly: Follow local regulations for safe disposal to minimize environmental impact.Why Choose Crystal Pro 10000?High Puff Capacity: Up to 10,000 puffs for long-lasting use.Premium Flavor Experience: Smooth, consistent taste in every puff.Maintenance-Free Design: No need to refill, charge, or replace coils.Sleek and Portable: Lightweight, ergonomic, and stylish for everyday use.Some of the popular flavors in the Crystal Pro 10000 range include:Tropical Fruit Mix: Sweet, refreshing tropical blend.Cool Menthol: Crisp menthol for a cooling vaping experience.Vanilla Custard: Smooth, creamy dessert-inspired taste.Berry Blast: Rich berry flavors with a sweet and tangy finish.Classic Tobacco: Traditional tobacco flavor for a classic vaping experience.Each flavor ensures smooth draws, rich vapor, and a satisfying experience from start to finish.Who Can Benefit from Crystal Pro 10000?Beginners: Ready-to-use device with no setup or maintenance required.Experienced Vapers: Long-lasting disposable for daily use.Travelers: Portable and convenient for on-the-go vaping.Retailers: High-demand product suitable for a broad customer base.The Crystal Pro 10000 Puffs Box of 5 is a premium disposable vape that combines convenience, flavor, and long-lasting performance. Its high puff count, variety of flavors, and maintenance-free design make it ideal for individual users and retailers alike.Whether for personal use or retail, the Crystal Pro 10000 provides a smooth, satisfying, and hassle-free vaping experience. Its growing popularity in the UK makes it a must-have disposable vape for anyone seeking a reliable, flavorful, and convenient device.

item.title: Embedding the Crystal Compiler in Your Program
item.author: kojix2
item.content:encoded: First, create a new Crystal project.crystal init app duck_egg duck_egg Edit the file as follows. In this example, we add and to the section.Create and add the following code.In this program, the Crystal compiler is embedded in the target 🥚. When 🥚 is executed, a random bird is selected. The embedded compiler generates a binary that displays the bird and its sound.First, build the program.Next, check the environment variable to find the location of the Crystal standard library.The Crystal compiler requires the standard library even for very simple code such as . Therefore, must be set to include the path to the standard library.lib:/usr/local/bin/../share/crystal/src Run the generated binary:By using the Crystal compiler as a library, you can generate and compile code dynamically. This technique can be applied in many interesting ways.

item.title: Writing SIMD in Crystal with Inline Assembly
item.author: kojix2
item.content:encoded:
In this article, we explore how to write SIMD instructions—SSE for x86\64 and NEON for AArch64—using inline assembly in the Crystal programming language. Crystal uses LLVM as its backend, but it doesn’t yet fully optimize with SIMD. This is not a performance tuning guide, but rather a fun exploration into low-level programming with Crystal.Crystal provides the keyword for writing inline assembly. The syntax is based on LLVM's integrated assembler.: LLVM-style assembly code: Registers that will be modified: Optional (e.g., )
Types of SIMD Instructions for Intel and AMD CPUs (x86_64) for ARM CPUs (like Apple Silicon)General-purpose: , , , , , , , ,
Registers Used in AArch64 (NEON) = 8 × 16-bit half-precision floats
Examples of Register Specification LLVM assigns SSE registers automaticallyNEON requires explicit register naming in inline assembly crystal build llvm-ir foo.cr crystal build asm foo.cr Use of and for low-level memory access
Examining LLVM-IR and Assembly To inspect LLVM IR output:crystal build your_file.cr llvm-ir crystal build your_file.cr asm You’ll see that your inline blocks are preserved as-is, even with optimizations ().Lloh2300: ldr q1, [x9, lCPI312_43@PAGEOFF] add x8, sp, #164 add x9, sp, #128 str q0, [sp, #128] stur q1, [x29, #-128] ; InlineAsm Start ld1.4s { v0 }, [x9] ld1.4s { v1 }, [x10] fadd.4s v2, v0, v1 st1.4s { v2 }, [x8] ; InlineAsm End ldr q0, [x25] str q0, [sp, #16] When using SIMD with parallelism, memory bandwidth can become the bottleneck. Although Crystal currently runs single-threaded by default, true parallelism is in progress, and memory limitations may become relevant in the future.We’ve explored how to write SIMD operations in Crystal using inline , and examined how those instructions are lowered into LLVM IR and eventually into assembly.This was a deep dive into low-level Crystal.
Appendix: SIMD Instruction Reference Load/store 4 × Float32 (unaligned)Load/store 4 × Float32 (aligned)Load/store 4 × Int32 or 8 × Int16Store scalar Float32 (lowest lane)Horizontal add of Float32 pairsElement-wise max (Float32)Shuffle Float32 lanes (for reduction)Load vector (e.g. , )Pairwise add (Float32 reduction)Pairwise max (Float32 reduction)Vector-wide add (optional)Vector-wide max (optional)SSE's and require 16-byte alignment.NEON's , reduce in two steps: 4 → 2 → 1. is used with masks like , for reordering lanes during reduction.Saturated arithmetic (, ) clamps values on overflow.Thanks for reading — and happy crystaling! 💎
